sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114960" key="xrusorani/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-ρᾰνίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">golden ewer,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
